name: Meat Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat fat in a skillet and brown the meat on both sides. Remove to a saucepan.
2. Add water and onions, then cook on low heat for 2 hours. Add mushrooms during the last half hour.
3. Grind everything together. Add seasoning and mix well.
4. For the dough: Cut butter into flour with a knife and rub in with fingertips. Add baking powder, egg yolks, eggs, and sour cream. Knead the dough briefly.
5. Roll out two rectangles measuring 18 x 6 inches.
6. Place a line of stuffing about one inch off one long side of each rectangle.
7. Fold the dough over the stuffing, brushing with egg white.
8. Cut into 26 patties. Place on a buttered cookie sheet.
9. Bake in a moderate oven at 350 degrees F for 35 minutes.
